title: Time, Events, and State in a Distributed System
description: A diagram illustrating the concepts of physical time, logical clocks (Lamport and Vector), events, and the happened-before relation across three processes in a distributed system.
relationships: Message passing creates a 'happened-before' relationship between events
An event's Lamport timestamp is greater than the timestamp of the event that caused it
A Vector Clock captures causal relationships by maintaining a counter for each process
